# PaginationUtilities.IsPaginatedMethod method

Returns `true` when *method* is one of the four paginated list methods. Mirrors TS `isPaginatedMethod`.

```csharp
public static bool IsPaginatedMethod(string method)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| method | The method name. |

## Return Value

`true` when paginated.
